2026-04-29T19:08:16.7894007Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-29T19:08:16.7894626Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-29T19:08:16.7895079Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-29T19:08:16.7895480Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-29T19:08:16.7895818Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-29T19:08:16.7896082Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-29T19:08:16.7896263Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-29T19:08:16.7896464Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-29T19:08:16.7896656Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-29T19:08:16.7896908Z [36;1m{[0m
2026-04-29T19:08:16.7897133Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_api_key=${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-29T19:08:16.7897445Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-29T19:08:16.7897738Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m
2026-04-29T19:08:16.7897972Z [36;1m[0m
